[30;1m401 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m402 | [0m[35m// Adapted from convert-source-map (MIT)[0m
[30;1m403 | [0m[35mfunction toComment(sourceMap) {[0m
[30;1m404 | [0m[35m  var base64 = new Buffer(JSON.stringify(sourceMap)).toString('base64');[0m
[30;1m405 | [0m[35m  var data = 'sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;charset=utf-8;base64,' + base64;[0m
[30;1m406 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m407 | [0m[35m  return '/*# ' + data + ' */';[0m

[31m--[ [0m[34mMatch #[0m[33m51[0m[34m of [0m[33m76[0m[31m ]--[0m

  Filename: [33m/package/dist/912ec66d7572ff821749319396470bde.svg[0m
